parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending. Allowed: rma_number, status, rma_date, created_at

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search by RMA number or sales order number

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter by status: draft, approved, in_transit, received, closed, canceled

parameters.name: filter[customer_id]
parameters.description: Filter by customer ID (searches via sales order)

parameters.name: filter[sales_order_id]
parameters.description: Filter by exact sales order ID
